entry.title: Why spiking neural network should embrace noise?
entry.content:
Noise often refer to something that is not informative and even harms the information we want. However, many studies propose that noise is necessary in the brain computation. This post aims to discuss the following three questions:

  1. When we say brain is noisy, what are we really talking about?
  2. What noise is good, and what is bad for neural computation?
  3. The possible mechanisms how noise get involved in the computation.

Todo…
